title: HTTP Semantics, Resources, Methods, and Status Contracts · Runtime Recall
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs http semantics, resources, methods, and status contracts from bounded request and server evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the resource, method, status, and retry semantics table. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for resource, method, status, and retry semantics table after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate resource identity, current server state, selected representation, transfer content, and backing storage model.
Apply safe, idempotent, and cacheable method semantics independently and preserve them through handler behavior.
Choose status, Location, validators, and response content for create, replace, partial update, asynchronous work, and deletion.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Resource Representation State · changed case · Review Resource Representation State
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 7976 in a internal administrative API crossing two trust zones. Build deterministic Go evidence to connect method semantics, resource state, status, and durable effect; then remove one trusted intermediary and recompute authority without forwarded fields. Browser code models decisions only. Listener, TLS, database, proxy, race, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
